creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Example logs:
2023/07/17 14:03:14 [alert] 93034#103181: worker process 79859 exited on signal 10

2023/07/17 14:27:08 [alert] 93034#103181: worker process 40855 exited on signal 10

2023/07/17 14:27:08 [alert] 93034#103181: worker process 11534 exited on signal 10
2023/07/17 14:27:09 [alert] 93034#103181: worker process 80071 exited on signal 10
2023/07/17 14:41:38 [alert] 93034#103181: worker process 39766 exited on signal 10
2023/07/17 14:48:50 [alert] 93034#103181: worker process 40404 exited on signal 10
2023/07/17 14:48:50 [alert] 93034#103181: worker process 38017 exited on signal 10

Each timestamp corresponds to a PURGE request.
